# Tables

## Basic Table

| Name     | Score | Grade |
|----------|-------|-------|
| Alice    | 95    | A     |
| Bob      | 82    | B     |
| Charlie  | 74    | C     |

## Column Alignment

| Left-aligned | Center-aligned | Right-aligned |
|:-------------|:--------------:|--------------:|
| Text         | Text           | Text          |
| 100          | 100            | 100           |
| 1,234.56     | 1,234.56       | 1,234.56      |

## Wide Table With Many Columns

| ID | First | Last     | Email               | Role    | Active |
|----|-------|----------|---------------------|---------|--------|
| 1  | Alice | Smith    | alice@example.com   | Admin   | Yes    |
| 2  | Bob   | Jones    | bob@example.com     | User    | Yes    |
| 3  | Carol | Williams | carol@example.com   | Editor  | No     |

## Table With Formatted Cells

| Feature      | Status        | Notes                        |
|--------------|---------------|------------------------------|
| **Bold**     | ✅ Supported  | Use `**text**`               |
| *Italic*     | ✅ Supported  | Use `*text*`                 |
| `Code`       | ✅ Supported  | Use backticks                |
| ~~Strike~~   | ✅ Supported  | Use `~~text~~`               |
| [Link](#)    | ✅ Supported  | Standard markdown links      |

## Single-Column Table

| Items         |
|---------------|
| First item    |
| Second item   |
| Third item    |
